sectionZero.title:
COSTERETA n1
the heart of La Vila
sectionZero.subtitle: A journey through what awaits you just a few steps away

section1.overtitle: 01. The Heart of Color: Costera de la Mar
section1.title: Live in the icon of the Costa Blanca
section1.p1: You are staying on Costera de la Mar, the most photographed and vibrant street in Villajoyosa. This historic axis is more than just an address; it is the bridge linking the legacy of the walled city with its seafaring soul.
section1.p2: Wake up surrounded by colorful facades and the Mediterranean breeze just steps from your door.

section2.title: Just meters away from the sand
section2.p1: Forget the car and unnecessary turns. From the heart of the old town, a direct path leads you straight to the Promenade and Playa Centro beach. In less than 5 minutes, you will go from the silence of cobbled streets to the vibrant bustle of the Mediterranean.
section2.p2: Ideal for that first morning swim or a sunset stroll.

section3.title: A feast for the senses
section3.p1: La Vila tastes of salt and cocoa. You are just around the corner from the best traditional taverns and harbor rice restaurants. Furthermore, the aroma of artisanal chocolate will guide you on a walk to the city's historic factories. A privileged location for lovers of fine food and authentic neighborhood life.

BookingCTA.title: Have you picked the dates for your next getaway?
BookingCTA.description: COSTERETA n1 awaits you in the heart of the old town. Check availability and book securely through our official booking manager.

Contact.title: Contact us
Contact.description: To ensure professional and secure assistance, we have delegated inquiries and booking management to a specialized agency. If you want more details about the accommodation or to check availability, click the link below to access their official portal.
Contact.note: (you will be redirected to our affiliated agency’s official portal)

Details.title: Details
features: Quick access to Villajoyosa central beach
Details.description: An interior designed for everyday living. Practical and functional furniture in a bright space that preserves the essence of traditional fishermen’s houses, adapted to the needs of modern travelers.
Details.locationDescription: The location in La Costera ensures a fully immersive experience. It is a pedestrian and vibrant area during the day and peaceful at night, ideal for true rest.
practicalInfo: Pedestrian Access: The apartment is located on a historic pedestrian street. Final access is on foot, allowing you to enjoy the charm of the old town.
Public Parking: We recommend parking at Parking del Río (lower area) or Parking del Centro (upper area). Both are about a 5–7 minute walk from the house.
Self Check-in: Smooth and flexible access so you can arrive at your own pace.
Fully Equipped: Kitchen with utensils, coffee maker, microwave, and basic cleaning kit.
Climate Control: Air conditioning and heating to ensure comfort all year round.
Connectivity: High-speed Wi-Fi included, ideal if you need to work remotely between swims.
